children.name: div
children.textContent: Average 4.2 hours of meetings every Tuesday — leaving only 1.8h for deep work.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Grocery + pharmacy separated by 2 days could be combined to save ~40 min/week.

children.name: div
children.textContent: You protect 8-9am for personal time 6/7 days. Keep it up!
